import subprocess
import sys
from pathlib import Path

uv_tau = ['uv', 'run', '--project', '/home/graham/workspace/experiments/tau', 'tau']
signal = Path('/home/graham/workspace/experiments/tau/experiments/goal-locked-subagents/proofs/real-world-sanity/20260705T163152Z-tau-broad-hardening-regression-20260705/dag-route-memory-approval/dag-signal-receipt.json')
candidate_receipt = Path('/home/graham/workspace/experiments/tau/experiments/goal-locked-subagents/proofs/real-world-sanity/20260705T163152Z-tau-broad-hardening-regression-20260705/dag-route-memory-approval/candidate-receipt.json')
sync_receipt = Path('/home/graham/workspace/experiments/tau/experiments/goal-locked-subagents/proofs/real-world-sanity/20260705T163152Z-tau-broad-hardening-regression-20260705/dag-route-memory-approval/sync-receipt.json')


def run(command, expected_exit):
    completed = subprocess.run(command, capture_output=True, text=True)
    if completed.stdout:
        print(completed.stdout, end="")
    if completed.stderr:
        print(completed.stderr, end="", file=sys.stderr)
    if completed.returncode != expected_exit:
        raise SystemExit(completed.returncode)
    return completed


run([
    *uv_tau,
    "dag-route-memory-candidates",
    "--signal-receipt",
    str(signal),
    "--receipt",
    str(candidate_receipt),
], 0)
completed = run([
    *uv_tau,
    "dag-route-memory-sync",
    "--candidate-receipt",
    str(candidate_receipt),
    "--receipt",
    str(sync_receipt),
    "--apply",
], 1)
raise SystemExit(completed.returncode)
purpose: Tau projects route-memory candidates locally, then blocks Memory sync apply when no memory_upsert approval receipt is supplied.
